MessageStrip.text: AACQ (Annual Allocated Contract Quantity) is sacrosanct and will NEVER change during reduction.

StandardListItem.title: 1. Select an Approved Plan
StandardListItem.description: Use the filter bar to find and select an approved annual plan from the list.

StandardListItem.title: 2. Define Reduction Inputs
StandardListItem.description: Choose Single Month or Month Range. Enter the reduction percentage (1–100%). Provide a mandatory reason.

StandardListItem.title: 3. Calculate Preview
StandardListItem.description: Click 'Calculate Preview'. The system shows a 3-row comparison: Original Plan | After Reduction | Difference (Δ).

StandardListItem.title: 4. Automatic Re-apportionment
StandardListItem.description: The reduced quantity is automatically distributed proportionally across all remaining months. AACQ stays unchanged.

StandardListItem.title: 5. Submit for Approval
StandardListItem.description: Submit the reduced plan for mandatory approval. No contract update happens before the approver confirms.

StandardListItem.title: Green row
StandardListItem.description: After Reduction values – final new monthly plan.

StandardListItem.title: Amber row
StandardListItem.description: Difference (Δ) row – shows how much each month changed.
